name: run-health-check
purpose: Main orchestrator entry point: runs all 11 health checkers, computes composite score via lib/composite, and outputs text or JSON health report with grade (A-F) and dimension drill-down.
sanitize_fields: dependencies on SoNash-specific checkers (debt-health, learning-effectiveness, data-effectiveness, ecosystem-integration)
notes: Supports --quick (4 fast checkers), --json, --dimension=ID flags. Invokes checkers synchronously via for-loop. Console.error for progress, console.log for output. Grade: A(90+) B(80+) C(70+) D(60+) F(<60). module_system: cjs (uses require()).

name: run-health-check.test
purpose: Test suite for scoring.js, dimensions.js, composite.js, and all checker module exports; validates boundary values, grade assignments, 14-dimension count, weighted score computation, and no_data handling.
notes: CJS (uses require). References node:test. Asserts exactly 14 dimensions and 9 categories. Validates composite produces 14 dimensionScores keys. Notable: test says 14 dimensions but describe() says '13 dimensions' — comment mismatch, assert wins.

name: mid-session-alerts.test
purpose: ESM test suite for lib/mid-session-alerts.js; validates deferred-aging alerts (30-day threshold), duplicate-deferral detection, score degradation (10-point drop), cooldown (1-hour window), and empty-state no-alert behavior.
notes: ESM module (uses import). Mixed with CJS project (no package.json type:module) — test runner must handle .js ESM explicitly. Uses mkdtempSync isolation. Imports mid-session-alerts from './lib/mid-session-alerts.js' (ESM). Alert types: deferred-aging, duplicate-deferrals, score-degradation.

name: checkers/code-quality
purpose: Runs TypeScript type-check, ESLint, pattern-compliance (npm run patterns:check), and circular-dependency detection; returns 8 metrics with scores and benchmarks under Code Quality dimension.
sanitize_fields: npm script names (type-check, lint, patterns:check, deps:circular — SoNash-specific)
notes: Metrics: ts_errors, eslint_errors, eslint_warnings, pattern_violations, circular_deps, ts_strict_coverage, lint_fix_ratio, code_style_score. Falls back from npm run type-check to npx tsc --noEmit. Quick-mode eligible (quick:true in orchestrator).

name: checkers/security
purpose: Runs npm audit (JSON) and npm run security:check; returns 4 metrics covering critical/high vulnerabilities and secret exposure detection.
sanitize_fields: npm:security:check script name (SoNash-specific, likely gitleaks wrapper)
notes: Metrics: critical_vulns, high_vulns, audit_status, secret_exposure. npm audit JSON parsed via safeParse. Secret check uses regex /secret|credential|leak/i on script output. Quick-mode eligible (quick:true).

name: checkers/debt-health
purpose: Reads docs/technical-debt/metrics.json and MASTER_DEBT.jsonl to compute 8 technical-debt metrics including S0/S1 alert counts, total open items, average age, resolution rate, 30-day intake/resolved flow.
notes: Metrics: s0_count, s1_count, total_open, avg_age_days, resolution_rate, intake_30d, resolved_30d, net_flow. Returns no_data:true if metrics.json missing. Quick-mode eligible (quick:true). Heavy dependency on SoNash TDMS (Technical Debt Management System) data files.

name: checkers/test-coverage
purpose: Reads most recent JSONL from .claude/test-results/ to compute pass rate, failed/error counts, and staleness; includes path traversal containment guard.
notes: Metrics: pass_rate, failed_count, error_count, staleness_days. Returns no_data:true if test-results dir missing or empty. Uses path.relative + /^\.\..(?:[/\\]|$)/ guard (security-helpers pattern). Quick-mode eligible (quick:true). Portable — reads generic JSONL format, no SoNash-specific logic.

name: checkers/learning-effectiveness
purpose: Parses docs/LEARNING_METRICS.md markdown table rows to extract violations-per-PR (30-day) and recurring-categories rate; returns 2 metrics.
sanitize_fields: Table parsing assumes fixed SoNash LEARNING_METRICS.md structure
notes: Metrics: violations_per_pr, recurrence_rate. Returns no_data:true if file missing or both metrics absent. Skips rows signaling 'insufficient_data'. Uses pipe-split over regex (SonarCloud S5852 compliance). Not quick-mode.

name: checkers/hook-pipeline
purpose: Reads .claude/state/hook-warnings-log.jsonl, .claude/override-log.jsonl, .claude/state/commit-failures.jsonl, and .git/hook-output.log to compute 12 hook-health metrics including warnings, overrides, false-positive ratio, commit failures, and noise ratio.
sanitize_fields: .claude/state/* paths (portable concept but SoNash state filenames)
noise_ratio git log pattern (SoNash-specific chore: commit message convention)
notes: Metrics: warnings_7d, overrides_7d, false_positive_pct, noise_ratio, commit_failures_7d, overrides_24h, warnings_24h, no_reason_pct, last_hook_passed, override_trend, top_warning_type, top_failed_check. Uses git log for noise ratio. Checks .git/hook-output.log for 'All pre-commit checks passed'. Not quick-mode.

name: checkers/session-management
purpose: Runs git status --porcelain and git log to compute uncommitted file count, stale branch age, and session gap hours from .claude/hooks/.session-state.json.
notes: Metrics: uncommitted_files, stale_branch_days, session_gap_hours. .session-state.json reads lastBegin/lastEnd fields — generic session-lifecycle schema that JASON-OS can adopt. Not quick-mode. Highly portable — git + generic session state.

name: checkers/documentation
purpose: Checks docs/SESSION_CONTEXT.md staleness, runs npm validate:canon, crossdoc:check, docs:placement, docs:external-links; counts docs/ .md files; returns 8 documentation health metrics.
sanitize_fields: npm script names (validate:canon, crossdoc:check, docs:placement, docs:external-links — SoNash-specific)
notes: Metrics: staleness_days, misplaced_docs, broken_links, crossdoc_issues, canon_issues, doc_count, freshness_score, coverage_estimate. freshness_score = max(0, 100 - stalenessDays*5). coverage_estimate = min(100, (docCount/25)*100). Not quick-mode.

name: checkers/pattern-enforcement
purpose: Reads .claude/state/warned-files.json to identify hotspot files and repeat offenders; runs npm patterns:sync and patterns:check for outdated pattern and sync-issue counts.
sanitize_fields: .claude/state/warned-files.json (SoNash state file — concept portable, filename portable)
npm:patterns:sync and npm:patterns:check (SoNash ESLint plugin scripts)
notes: Metrics: repeat_offenders, outdated_patterns, hotspot_files, sync_issues. warned-files.json supports two shapes: {files: {filename: count}} or {filename: count} directly. Repeat offender threshold: 3+ warnings. Not quick-mode.

name: checkers/ecosystem-integration
purpose: Reads .claude/state/review-metrics.jsonl, runs gh run list for CI status, checks sonar:check, reads velocity-log.jsonl, and runs reviews:sync-check and review:churn; returns 8 ecosystem integration metrics.
sanitize_fields: gh CLI dependency (portable but requires GitHub environment)
npm:reviews:sync-check, npm:review:churn (SoNash PR review system scripts)
review-metrics.jsonl schema (fix_ratio, review_rounds fields — SoNash pr-review skill output)
notes: Metrics: avg_fix_ratio, avg_rounds, review_count, ci_failures, sonar_issues, velocity_avg, reviews_missing, churn_pct. Uses last 5 review-metrics entries sorted by timestamp. Not quick-mode. Most coupled checker to SoNash infrastructure.

name: checkers/data-effectiveness
purpose: Reads .claude/state/lifecycle-scores.jsonl to compute 5 data-effectiveness metrics: average lifecycle score, below-threshold percentage, recall coverage, action coverage, and orphan count.
sanitize_fields: lifecycle-scores.jsonl schema (total, recall, action fields — SoNash TDMS data lifecycle concept)
notes: Metrics: avg_lifecycle_score, below_threshold_pct, recall_coverage, action_coverage, orphan_count. Returns no_data:true if file missing. Orphan = recall=0. threshold=6. Not quick-mode. The 'data effectiveness' concept (lifecycle scoring) is SoNash-TDMS-specific but the checker pattern is portable.
